constraints.layout_style: unstyled div soup with inline styles only

required_complexity_patterns.notes: At least two fields with aria-label only and no visible label element
Fields inside details/summary or hidden until click
Apply form hosted inside iframe or srcdoc iframe shell
Fields inside a shadow DOM host or declarative shadow root
Inputs laid out in table cells, not flex card stacks only

reference_templates.title: Submit outside form
reference_templates.notes: Submit button outside form linked via form= attribute
reference_templates.dom_excerpt: External submit

reference_templates.title: Duplicate name attributes
reference_templates.notes: Two distinct fields share the same name attribute (invalid but seen in the wild)
reference_templates.dom_excerpt: Duplicate name attributes

reference_templates.title: Radio styled as buttons
reference_templates.notes: Native radios hidden; visible pill buttons styled via CSS class
reference_templates.dom_excerpt:
Radio pill buttons

Are you authorized to work in the UK?

prompt_summary: Create a messy, production-real ashby-style job application (single-page, small, tier=high). Widgets: combobox. Required: At least two fields with aria-label only and no visible label element Required: Fields inside details/summary or hidden until click Required: Apply form hosted inside iframe or srcdoc iframe shell Required: Fields inside a shadow DOM host or declarative shadow root Required: Inputs laid out in table cells, not flex card stacks only Reference DOM (Submit outside form): Submit button outside form linked via form= attribute Reference DOM (Duplicate name attributes): Two distinct fields share the same name attribute (invalid but seen in the wild) Reference DOM (Radio styled as buttons): Native radios hidden; visible pill buttons styled via CSS class Do NOT produce a tutorial-style form where every field is label[for]+native input. Mix native controls with non-semantic production DOM from the patterns below. Implement ALL required complexity patterns: aria-label-only, details-accordion, iframe-apply, shadow-host, table-layout. Include at least one custom widget (div role=textbox, pill buttons, or listbox combobox). Include at least one labeling strategy besides label-for (aria-label, aria-labelledby, glued spans, placeholder-only). Layout: unstyled div soup with inline styles only. Avoid generic centered SaaS card as the only structure. High tier: include shadow DOM host OR iframe apply shell OR wizard/conditional reveal with hidden fields. Mirror structural messiness like these references: Submit outside form; Duplicate name attributes; Radio styled as buttons.
